title: Why Is Capital One (COF) Up 3.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Capital One (COF) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: A Trio of Stocks Trading With Low Price-to-Free-Cash-Flow Ratios
text: To increase your chances of discovering value opportunities, one method is to screen the market for stocks with lower trailing 12-month price-to-free-cash-flow ratios than that of the S&P 500 Index, which stands at around 15.63 as of the time of writing.

title: Does Capital One's Discount to Peers Make the Stock a Value Play?
text: Capital One's stock is performing well, but there are indications it may not be as much of a value play as the market thinks.

title: Capital One Stock Posted Better Than Expected Results In Q4, Is It A Buy?
text: Capital One's stock has gained roughly 9% YTD as compared to the 4% drop in the S&P500 over the same period. Further, at its current price of $159 per share, it is trading 15% below its fair value of $182 – Trefis' estimate for Capital One's valuation.

title: Capital One Venture X Rewards credit card review: Excellent value for a premium card with a 100,000-mile bonus, travel credits, and airport lounge access
text: The Capital One Venture X card comes with up to $300 in annual travel credit, Capital One and Priority Pass lounge access, and Visa Infinite benefits.
